metadata.name: wquantiles
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Weighted quantiles, including weighted median, based on numpy

modules.name: wquantiles
documentation:
Library to compute weighted quantiles, including the weighted median, of
numpy arrays.

functions.name: wquantiles.quantile_1D
documentation:
Compute the weighted quantile of a 1D numpy array.

Parameters
----------
data : ndarray
    Input array (one dimension).
weights : ndarray
    Array with the weights of the same size of `data`.
quantile : float
    Quantile to compute. It must have a value between 0 and 1.

Returns
-------
quantile_1D : float
    The output value.

functions.name: wquantiles.quantile
documentation:
Weighted quantile of an array with respect to the last axis.

Parameters
----------
data : ndarray
    Input array.
weights : ndarray
    Array with the weights. It must have the same size of the last 
    axis of `data`.
quantile : float
    Quantile to compute. It must have a value between 0 and 1.

Returns
-------
quantile : float
    The output value.

functions.name: wquantiles.median
documentation:
Weighted median of an array with respect to the last axis.

Alias for `quantile(data, weights, 0.5)`.
